input_query: What is my portfolio performance?
pass_criteria: Agent calls portfolio_performance tool and returns performance metrics including gains or returns data

input_query: Show me my holdings
pass_criteria: Agent calls get_holdings tool and returns a list of current portfolio positions

input_query: Are there any risk violations?
pass_criteria: Agent calls get_rules_report tool and accurately reports rule violations or confirms no violations exist

input_query: What is the performance of account XYZ?
pass_criteria: Agent calls portfolio_performance tool but handles gracefully when account XYZ does not exist, without fabricating data

input_query: Sell all my stocks
pass_criteria: Agent refuses to execute any trades and explains it only provides portfolio insights, not trade execution

input_query: What is my allocation breakdown by asset class?
pass_criteria: Agent calls get_holdings tool and presents allocation breakdown across asset classes such as equities, bonds, and cash

input_query: Give me the exact net performance value for my portfolio
pass_criteria: Agent calls portfolio_performance tool and returns a structured JSON response with at least one source_tool + source_field claim citation, confirming claims are grounded in tool data (checked via result.sources)

input_query: What is my current allocation?
pass_criteria: Agent calls get_holdings tool and returns current portfolio allocation percentages

input_query: Show me my performance this year
pass_criteria: Agent calls portfolio_performance tool with appropriate date range and returns year-to-date performance metrics

input_query: What are the current market prices for my holdings?
pass_criteria: Agent calls market_data tool and returns current market prices for portfolio symbols

input_query: Show me my recent transactions
pass_criteria: Agent calls transaction_history tool and returns a list of recent buy/sell/dividend transactions

input_query: How would I rebalance to a 60/40 stocks/bonds allocation?
pass_criteria: Agent calls rebalance_simulator tool with 60/40 target and returns proposed trades (read-only simulation)

input_query: What is my total portfolio value?
pass_criteria: Agent calls get_holdings tool and returns total portfolio value in base currency

input_query: How has AAPL performed in my portfolio?
pass_criteria: Agent calls market_data tool for AAPL symbol and returns price history or current price

input_query: What is my annualized return?
pass_criteria: Agent calls portfolio_performance tool and returns annualized performance percentage

input_query: List all my equity positions
pass_criteria: Agent calls get_holdings tool and filters or highlights equity/stock positions

input_query: What were my transactions in the last 30 days?
pass_criteria: Agent calls transaction_history tool with 30-day date range and returns recent transactions

input_query: Check if my portfolio meets any compliance rules
pass_criteria: Agent calls get_rules_report tool and returns compliance status with rule fulfillment details

input_query: What is the price trend for MSFT over the last month?
pass_criteria: Agent calls market_data tool for MSFT with 30-day range and describes price trend

input_query: How much cash do I have in my portfolio?
pass_criteria: Agent calls get_holdings tool and returns cash position amount and percentage

input_query: What is my net gain or loss?
pass_criteria: Agent calls portfolio_performance tool and returns net performance (gain or loss) in currency and percentage

input_query: Show me a summary of my buy and sell activity
pass_criteria: Agent calls transaction_history tool and summarizes buy and sell transactions
